evals.name: named-project-full
evals.expected_output: ASCII dashboard for dharness: box w/ version, progress bar(s), HANDOFF prev/wip/next, phase checklist (✓/◔/○), results tallies, recent activity, warnings, src line. Numbers match memory body.

evals.name: casual-other-project
evals.prompt: 어디까지 했지? methodology-advisor 현황 좀 보여줘
evals.expected_output: Recognizes status request for methodology-advisor from casual phrasing; renders its dashboard from memory + project folder; does not re-ask which project.
assertions: flagged stale memory if version differs from live

evals.name: no-arg-disambiguation
evals.expected_output: No project named: lists candidates from MEMORY.md and asks which one. Does not render an arbitrary dashboard.
assertions: did NOT render an arbitrary dashboard
